org.gbfs.System.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for GBFS system metadata CloudEvents on the `gbfs-bikeshare` topic keyed by `{system_id}`.

org.gbfs.Stations.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for GBFS station reference and station-status CloudEvents on the `gbfs-bikeshare` topic keyed by `{system_id}/{station_id}`.

org.gbfs.FreeBikes.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for GBFS free-bike position CloudEvents on the `gbfs-bikeshare` topic keyed by `{system_id}/{bike_id}`.

org.gbfs.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5.0 producer endpoint for GBFS CloudEvents using the mobility Unified Namespace topic hierarchy.

org.gbfs.Amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 producer endpoint for GBFS CloudEvents on the configured broker address.

org.gbfs.SystemInformation.name: SystemInformation
org.gbfs.SystemInformation.description: Reference data describing one GBFS system as published in `system_information.json`, including the public system name, operator, customer-facing URL, timezone, and support metadata. Emitted at bridge startup and on reference refresh so consumers can join station and vehicle telemetry against stable system metadata.

org.gbfs.system.description: Transport-neutral GBFS system reference events keyed by the stable GBFS `system_id`.

org.gbfs.StationInformation.name: StationInformation
org.gbfs.StationInformation.description: Reference data for one dock-based GBFS station from `station_information.json`. The event carries the stable station identifier, public name, WGS 84 coordinates, docking capacity, and optional address / regional context so consumers can interpret real-time availability telemetry.

org.gbfs.StationStatus.name: StationStatus
org.gbfs.StationStatus.description: Real-time station availability telemetry from `station_status.json`. Each event describes the current rentable-bike count, dock availability, operating flags, and the upstream `last_reported` timestamp for one GBFS station.

org.gbfs.stations.description: Transport-neutral GBFS station reference and station-status events keyed by `{system_id}/{station_id}`.

org.gbfs.FreeBikeStatus.name: FreeBikeStatus
org.gbfs.FreeBikeStatus.description: Real-time dockless vehicle telemetry from `free_bike_status.json` (renamed `vehicle_status.json` in GBFS v3). Each event carries the last known location, reservation and disablement state, optional vehicle type reference, and optional remaining range for a single rentable vehicle that is not currently in an active trip.

org.gbfs.free_bikes.description: Transport-neutral GBFS free-bike telemetry events keyed by `{system_id}/{bike_id}`.

org.gbfs.kafka.system.description: Kafka bindings for GBFS system reference events.

org.gbfs.kafka.stations.description: Kafka bindings for GBFS station reference and station-status events.

org.gbfs.kafka.free_bikes.description: Kafka bindings for GBFS free-bike telemetry events.

org.gbfs.mqtt.system.description: MQTT 5 bindings for GBFS system reference events.

org.gbfs.mqtt.stations.description: MQTT 5 bindings for GBFS station reference and availability events.

org.gbfs.mqtt.free_bikes.description: MQTT 5 bindings for GBFS free-bike position events.

org.gbfs.amqp.system.description: AMQP 1.0 bindings for GBFS system reference events.

subject.description: AMQP subject mirrors the CloudEvents subject for one GBFS system.

x-opt-partition-key.description: Partition key mirrors the GBFS system identity.

org.gbfs.amqp.stations.description: AMQP 1.0 bindings for GBFS station reference and station-status events.

subject.description: AMQP subject mirrors the CloudEvents subject for one GBFS station.

x-opt-partition-key.description: Partition key mirrors the GBFS station identity.

subject.description: AMQP subject mirrors the CloudEvents subject for one GBFS station.

x-opt-partition-key.description: Partition key mirrors the GBFS station identity.

org.gbfs.amqp.free_bikes.description: AMQP 1.0 bindings for GBFS free-bike telemetry events.

subject.description: AMQP subject mirrors the CloudEvents subject for one dockless vehicle.

x-opt-partition-key.description: Partition key mirrors the GBFS vehicle identity.

schema.name: StationInformation
schema.description: Dock-based station reference data from the GBFS `station_information.json` feed. Each record identifies one station in a bikeshare or scooter-share system and provides the stable station identifier, customer-facing name, WGS 84 coordinates, docking capacity, and optional regional or address context.

system_id.description: Stable identifier for the GBFS system that publishes this station. The bridge resolves it from `system_information.system_id`, or from operator configuration when a custom label is supplied. It is the first component of the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

station_id.description: Unique station identifier within the GBFS system, sourced from the `station_id` field in `station_information.json`. This identifier is stable across feed refreshes and forms the second component of the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

name.description: Public-facing station name from `station_information.json`. GBFS recommends mixed-case, human-readable names suitable for maps, screens, and accessibility tooling.

short_name.description: Optional short station name or numbering code from the `short_name` field in `station_information.json`, such as a kiosk number or abbreviated label used on maps or in the operator app.

lat.description: WGS 84 latitude of the station in decimal degrees from `station_information.json`. GBFS recommends six decimal places of precision for latitude / longitude coordinates.

lon.description: WGS 84 longitude of the station in decimal degrees from `station_information.json`. Positive values are east of the prime meridian and negative values are west.

capacity.description: Total number of docking points or parking capacity published for the station in `station_information.json`. When omitted upstream, the bridge emits null rather than inventing a capacity.

region_id.description: Optional region identifier from the `region_id` field in `station_information.json`. When present, it links the station to a region published in `system_regions.json`.

address.description: Optional street address from the `address` field in `station_information.json`, as supplied by the operator for customer navigation.

post_code.description: Optional postal or ZIP code from the `post_code` field in `station_information.json`.

schema.name: StationStatus
schema.description: Near-real-time station availability data from the GBFS `station_status.json` feed. Each record reports the current inventory of rentable vehicles and available docks together with boolean operating flags and the upstream `last_reported` timestamp for the station.

system_id.description: Stable identifier for the GBFS system that publishes this station status record.

station_id.description: Stable station identifier from the `station_id` field in `station_status.json`, matching the corresponding `StationInformation` event.

num_bikes_available.description: Current number of rentable bikes or vehicles available at the station from the `num_bikes_available` field in `station_status.json`.

num_docks_available.description: Current number of empty docks or parking spaces available for return at the station from `num_docks_available`. Some operators omit this field, in which case the bridge emits null.

num_ebikes_available.description: Current number of electric bikes available at the station from `num_ebikes_available` when the operator distinguishes e-bikes from the aggregate bike count.

is_installed.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the station is physically installed, normalized from the GBFS `is_installed` value.

is_renting.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the station is currently accepting rentals, normalized from the GBFS `is_renting` value.

is_returning.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the station is currently accepting vehicle returns, normalized from the GBFS `is_returning` value.

last_reported.description: POSIX timestamp from the GBFS `last_reported` field representing when the operator backend last received a status update for this station.

schema.name: FreeBikeStatus
schema.description: Dockless vehicle telemetry from the GBFS `free_bike_status.json` feed, which is renamed `vehicle_status.json` in GBFS v3. Each record describes a currently available vehicle that is not in an active rental and can include location, reservation state, disablement state, vehicle type reference, and remaining electric range.

system_id.description: Stable identifier for the GBFS system that publishes this dockless-vehicle status record.

bike_id.description: Unique vehicle identifier from the `bike_id` field in `free_bike_status.json`. This value is stable for the vehicle within the system and forms the second component of the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key.

lat.description: Optional WGS 84 latitude in decimal degrees for the vehicle's current position. GBFS allows free-bike records without coordinates when precise location is not published.

lon.description: Optional WGS 84 longitude in decimal degrees for the vehicle's current position.

is_reserved.description: Boolean flag from `is_reserved` indicating whether the vehicle is currently reserved for a customer and therefore not immediately rentable by others.

is_disabled.description: Boolean flag from `is_disabled` indicating whether the vehicle is disabled or otherwise unavailable for rental.

vehicle_type_id.description: Optional vehicle-type identifier from `vehicle_type_id`, used by operators that publish multiple vehicle classes such as e-bikes or scooters.

current_range_meters.description: Optional remaining electric range in meters from `current_range_meters`, typically published for electric vehicles.

last_reported.description: Optional POSIX timestamp from the `last_reported` field representing the last time the operator backend received a telemetry update for this vehicle.

schema.name: SystemInformation
schema.description: Reference data from the GBFS `system_information.json` feed. Each record describes one bikeshare or shared-micromobility system, including the stable `system_id`, public name, operator, website, timezone, language, and customer support metadata.

system_id.description: Stable identifier for the GBFS system from the `system_id` field in `system_information.json`, or a configured override when the user supplies `GBFS_SYSTEM_IDS` to relabel systems consistently across deployments.

name.description: Public system display name from the `name` field in `system_information.json`, such as the brand name shown in the operator app and on the website.

operator.description: Optional operator company or agency name from the `operator` field in `system_information.json`.

url.description: Optional public website URL from the `url` field in `system_information.json`.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier from the `timezone` field in `system_information.json`, such as `America/New_York` or `Europe/London`.

language.description: Optional BCP-47 language tag from the `language` field in `system_information.json`, representing the primary language used in this dataset.

phone_number.description: Optional customer-service phone number from the `phone_number` field in `system_information.json`.
